summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening now links more directly to chapter 16's site-photo/signature close, and Sarah's end-scene reaction now more clearly seeds the lie dynamic that continues into chapter 18. Core beats, tone, and dialogue register remain unchanged.
edits: Linked the opening chain-link image to the site photos from the previous chapter.
Added a brief Sarah hesitation beat at the end to strengthen continuity into the next chapter's ongoing evasions.
